headline: Is W. R. Berkley (WRB) Pricing Look Stretched After Strong Five Year Share Gains
summary: If you are wondering whether W. R. Berkley is fairly priced or offering value right now, this article will walk through the numbers in plain language so you can judge for yourself. The stock last closed at US$68.70, with returns of 1.3% decline over 7 days, 1.7% decline over 30 days, 1.0% decline year to date, and gains of 14.0% over 1 year, 76.0% over 3 years, and 128.0% over 5 years. Recent coverage of W. R. Berkley has focused on how the insurer is positioned within the wider US insurance...
